text: I feel curious and alert in this environment. The sterile brightness of the entryway gives way to a vibrant, thoughtfully designed exhibit area. The air holds a sense of anticipation, as if knowledge and innovation are suspended here, waiting for me to engage with them. The juxtaposition of glass, lights, and the bold R+D display makes me feel as though I am at the threshold of discovery, but also slightly disoriented by the newness and unfamiliar angles.
